payload.contract: build/reserve/RDTB_prediction.md — Part A(3-4) (pre-registered band logic + mechanical verdict rule)
payload.establishment: NOT ESTABLISHED — output of the RDT-B Part-A assembly run; no result herein is established until the verifier scenario (deterministic re-run of build/reserve/RDTB_recompute.py reproducing this JSON, recorded in build/reserve/RDTB_verify.json) has run and its artifact exists
payload.no_date_no_probability: no date and no probability is computed anywhere in this artifact
payload.concept: bound on China's official USD-asset share of disclosed FX (ex-gold) reserves (the LMW concept; the RDT k1 coordinate and its 13.89pp frontier live on this denominator); incl-gold variant reported alongside, labelled
payload.p_ref_source: RDT_coordinates.parquet _PREF row gold_usd_per_oz_2021mean (2021 mean of WB Pink Sheet monthly gold prices; constant-price rule per RDT_prediction.md); troy-oz conversion 1e6/31.1034768 (same constant as RDT_recompute.py)

denominators.source: build/reserve/rdt_k2_gold.csv CHN rows (World Bank API FI.RES.TOTL.CD / FI.RES.XGLD.CD; gold tonnes WGC CBD v11 republishing IMF IFS, Q4)

safe_ora_year_end_crosscheck.note: SAFE ORA December values (100 million USD scaled to $bn) vs WB year-end; SAFE ex-gold = ORA total minus gold line; discrepancies reported, not smoothed (WB ex-gold is the committed denominator per the pre-registration)

rows.note: the committed safe_ora_2024 file carries an EMPTY 2024.12 column (its footnote lists USD/SDR conversion rates only through 2024-11): the SAFE year-end value is NOT-AVAILABLE on disk — reported, not smoothed; the 2024.11 values are shown as labelled context only, not compared to the WB year-end denominator

payload.bias_direction_rule: Pre-registered bias-direction rule (RDTB_prediction.md Part A): only components observed as official-attributable (foreign-OFFICIAL holder sector, China-attributable) may enter the LOWER bound; a TOTAL-RESIDENT (official + private mixed) component OVERSTATES the official quantity and is barred from the lower bound (upper-side information only); an all-countries OFFICIAL aggregate is not China-attributable and is likewise ineligible. A total-resident component inside the lower bound is a build failure.

component_inventory.custody_treatment: bank-liability component attributed by counterparty residence (China residents); no securities custody band applicable; total-resident, upper-side context only
component_inventory.why_excluded_from_lower_bound: holder sector TOTAL_RESIDENT (official + private mixed): OVERSTATES_OFFICIAL — barred from the lower bound by the pre-registered bias-direction rule; upper-side information only
component_inventory.source: BIS LBS WS_LBS_D_PUB series Q.S.L.A.USD.A.5J.A.5A.A.CN.N (USD cross-border liabilities of all reporting banks to all sectors resident in China, Q4, USD mn scaled to bn), https://stats.bis.org/api/v2/data/dataflow/BIS/WS_LBS_D_PUB/1.0/ raw bis_lbs_L_USD_CN_A.csv, fetched 2026-07-02

component_inventory.custody_treatment: loan-and-deposit subset of the BIS series; counterparty-residence attribution; total-resident, upper-side context only
component_inventory.why_excluded_from_lower_bound: holder sector TOTAL_RESIDENT (official + private mixed): OVERSTATES_OFFICIAL — barred from the lower bound by the pre-registered bias-direction rule; upper-side information only
component_inventory.source: BIS LBS WS_LBS_D_PUB series Q.S.L.G.USD.A.5J.A.5A.A.CN.N (USD cross-border loan-and-deposit liabilities of all reporting banks to all sectors resident in China, Q4, USD mn scaled to bn), https://stats.bis.org/api/v2/data/dataflow/BIS/WS_LBS_D_PUB/1.0/ raw bis_lbs_L_loansdep_USD_CN_A.csv, fetched 2026-07-02

component_inventory.why_excluded_from_lower_bound: holder sector OFFICIAL but all-countries aggregate (country=ALL): UNDERSTATES_OFFICIAL for the world total yet NOT attributable to China — ineligible for a China lower bound
component_inventory.source: TIC SHL 2025 report Exhibit 7 Official row, all countries, LT securities End-June (billions), https://www.treasury.gov/resource-center/data-chart-center/tic/Documents/shl2025r.pdf p.19, fetched 2026-07-02

component_inventory.why_excluded_from_lower_bound: holder sector OFFICIAL but all-countries aggregate (country=ALL): UNDERSTATES_OFFICIAL for the world total yet NOT attributable to China — ineligible for a China lower bound
component_inventory.source: TIC SHL 2025 report Exhibit 7 Treasury-debt Official row, all countries, End-June (billions), https://www.treasury.gov/resource-center/data-chart-center/tic/Documents/shl2025r.pdf p.19, fetched 2026-07-02

component_inventory.custody_treatment: US-securities component: China-alone and China+Belgium+Luxembourg custody variants carried (band, never collapsed); since the component is total-resident it appears only in the upper-side context table
component_inventory.why_excluded_from_lower_bound: holder sector TOTAL_RESIDENT (official + private mixed): OVERSTATES_OFFICIAL — barred from the lower bound by the pre-registered bias-direction rule; upper-side information only
component_inventory.source: TIC SHL Table A1 (June 2015), shl2015r-appx/shl_app01_2015.csv in https://www.treasury.gov/resource-center/data-chart-center/tic/Documents/shl2015r-appx.zip, fetched 2026-07-02

component_inventory.custody_treatment: US-securities component (long-term only, 2015-2019 single-year vintages): custody band carried; total-resident, upper-side context only
component_inventory.why_excluded_from_lower_bound: holder sector TOTAL_RESIDENT (official + private mixed): OVERSTATES_OFFICIAL — barred from the lower bound by the pre-registered bias-direction rule; upper-side information only
component_inventory.source: TIC SHL Table A1 LT-Treasury col (June 2015), shl2015r-appx/shl_app01_2015.csv in https://www.treasury.gov/resource-center/data-chart-center/tic/Documents/shl2015r-appx.zip, fetched 2026-07-02

component_inventory.custody_treatment: US-securities component: custody band carried (China-alone / China+Belgium+Luxembourg); total-resident, upper-side context only
component_inventory.why_excluded_from_lower_bound: holder sector TOTAL_RESIDENT (official + private mixed): OVERSTATES_OFFICIAL — barred from the lower bound by the pre-registered bias-direction rule; upper-side information only
component_inventory.source: TIC SHL 2025 report Exhibit 14 Total Treasuries End-June (billions), https://www.treasury.gov/resource-center/data-chart-center/tic/Documents/shl2025r.pdf p.34, fetched 2026-07-02

component_inventory.why_excluded_from_lower_bound: holder sector OFFICIAL but all-countries aggregate (country=ALL): UNDERSTATES_OFFICIAL for the world total yet NOT attributable to China — ineligible for a China lower bound
component_inventory.source: TIC MFH history, For. Official row, Dec 2015 column (billions), on-disk build/reserve/rdt_evidence/tic/mfhhis01.csv (publisher https://www.treasury.gov/resource-center/data-chart-center/tic/Documents/mfhhis01.csv, on-disk copy fetched 2026-07-01)

lower_bound.statement: the LOWER bound is NOT-CONSTRUCTIBLE from official-attributable components: zero lower-bound-eligible components ground (no by-country official split exists in TIC SLT, TIC SHL, the TIC official-institution lines, or BIS LBS — see rdtb_a_manifest.json schema findings); recorded per year with each candidate component, its bias direction, and why it is excluded

incl_gold_basis.formula: U_incl(y) = 100 - constant-price gold value share(pct, P_ref basis) - any other OBSERVED non-dollar component (none grounded -> 0)

per_year.other_observed_non_dollar_components_not: none grounded (no non-USD component was observed in any inspected source)

none grounded (no non-USD component was observed in any inspected source)

ex_gold_basis.formula: U_ex(y) = 100 - 100*(observed non-USD FX components)/FX-ex-gold; no non-USD FX component is observed in any grounded source -> U_ex = 100pp

upper_bound.weakness_statement: stated plainly, as pre-registered: unobserved non-USD assets make the upper side weak — it sits at ~96pp (incl-gold) / 100pp (ex-gold) and does not materially constrain the USD share

bis_lbs_usd_deposits_total_resident.label: CONTEXT ONLY — TOTAL-RESIDENT (all sectors resident in China), NEVER official-attributable: BIS LBS publishes no official/central-bank counterparty split for the China key (sectors M and O return no data); this series cannot enter the lower bound and is not an official quantity

shl_total_securities_custody_band.label: CONTEXT ONLY — TOTAL-RESIDENT, not official: TIC SHL by-country holdings have no holder-sector split; the CN+BE+LU pooled variant is the custody upper envelope (Euroclear/Clearstream custody also serves non-China clients) and exceeds China's reserves by construction in recent years; June vintages over WB year-end denominators (vintage mismatch, labelled)

verdict.rule_quoted: NON-DEGENERATE iff L_cons(latest available year) >= 13.89pp + 5pp (i.e., >= 18.89pp); STILL-DEGENERATE otherwise (including: the official split is not published; the components do not ground). (RDTB_prediction.md, Part A, fixed before any component was seen.)
verdict.L_cons_latest_value: NOT-CONSTRUCTIBLE (zero official-attributable, China-attributable USD components ground in TIC SLT / TIC SHL / TIC official-institution lines / BIS LBS)
verdict.consequence: the k1 cell stays UNDETERMINED and the SAFE-vintage judgment returns to the human gate; the composite is NOT recomputed (pre-registered ONLY-if rule: recompute only if k1 became non-degenerate)
verdict.falsifiable_expectation_branch_realized: the pre-registered IF-branch "if the split is not published, STILL-DEGENERATE" is the branch that realized: the by-country official split is not published in any inspected source
verdict.upper_side_statement: the upper side is WEAK, as pre-registered: with no observed non-USD component, U_incl-gold(y) = 100 - constant-price gold share (~96pp) and U_ex-gold(y) = 100pp; neither constrains the USD share materially

SOURCE: build/reserve/rdtb_a_components.csv + rdtb_a_manifest.json + rdtb_a_provenance.md (RDT-B Part A(1-2) grounding, fetched 2026-07-02: TIC SLT/SHL/MFH, BIS LBS)
build/reserve/rdt_k2_gold.csv (WB FI.RES.TOTL.CD / FI.RES.XGLD.CD; WGC CBD v11 gold tonnes)
build/reserve/RDT_coordinates.parquet (_PREF gold_usd_per_oz_2021mean; CHN k2 input rows, cross-check)
build/reserve/rd2_evidence/safe_ora_2020.xls .. safe_ora_2025.xlsx (SAFE Official Reserve Assets monthly tables; December columns)
contract: build/reserve/RDTB_prediction.md Part A (pre-registered 2026-07-02, before any component was seen)

self_check.note: re-running this script from the on-disk inputs alone regenerates the payload; payload_sha256 is the hash of the serialized payload object (this self_check block excluded)
